issues.description: Effect structure missing 'condition' field. Card text says 'You may trash 1 card' indicating optional action with conditional trigger. Current structure implies mandatory trash then rest sequence.

Rest action target is incorrect. Should filter for opponent's DON!! cards specifically (has DON keyword/type), not generic ChooseOpponentCharacter. Target should be {"scope":"ChooseOpponentCard","filter":{"hasKeyword":"DON"}}
Rest action count missing. Card says 'up to 1' but no count/max specification in action. Should include "count":1,"max":1 or "maxCount":1
Extraneous trigger present. Second effect with trigger:"Trigger" and condition:"Always" with PlaySelf action should not exist. This card is a character that should not have auto-play logic.
